global.description: The ad features a vibrant layout with various graphic elements and text promoting a service.
global.main_message: Promoting a subscription service with a special offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: top background area
elements.description: A solid color background occupying the top portion of the ad, providing a vibrant backdrop.

elements.label: central graphic area
elements.description: A large central area featuring abstract shapes, possibly representing content or features of the service.

elements.label: overlapping graphic
elements.description: An overlapping rectangular shape in the center, suggesting a focus on a specific feature or offer.

elements.label: secondary graphic
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape positioned centrally, likely highlighting additional content or features.

elements.label: additional graphic area
elements.description: Another central rectangular area that complements the other graphics, enhancing the visual appeal.

elements.label: graphic element
elements.description: A central graphic element that adds depth and interest to the overall design.

elements.label: graphic overlay
elements.description: A central overlay graphic that adds complexity to the visual composition.

elements.label: small circles
elements.description: Three small circles arranged in a row, possibly representing user-generated content or testimonials.

elements.label: additional circle
elements.description: A single circle positioned centrally, likely representing another user-generated content element.

elements.label: small circle
elements.description: Another small circle that adds to the social proof aspect of the ad.

elements.label: duplicate circle
elements.description: A duplicate of the previous small circle, reinforcing the social proof theme.

elements.label: bottom text area
elements.description: A small text area at the bottom, likely containing a call to action.

elements.label: main message
elements.description: A prominent text area at the bottom featuring the main message and offer details.
elements.text_content: Binge starts now Start free today €29.92 Order now

elements.label: brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'MoonScreen' displayed prominently at the top, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label indicating user-generated content, positioned at the top left.
